name: Domain Override Threshold Impact Analysis
purpose: Quantify the effect of applying domain-specific threshold overrides vs defaults

domain_overrides_tested.verdict: Override justified — catches real clinical hallucination incidents
Override justified — EU AI Act high-risk transparency requirement
Override justified — IDE responsiveness directly impacts developer productivity
Override justified — GDPR stricter PII requirements

conclusion: Domain overrides consistently catch real incidents that default thresholds miss, at the cost of a small increase in false positive rate. All tested overrides are justified based on regulatory requirements or empirical correlation with user impact.
